name: AECOM
summary: PART I In this report, we use the terms the Company, we, us and our to refer to AECOM and its consolidated subsidiaries. Unless otherwise noted, references to years are for fiscal years. Our fiscal year consists of 52 or 53 weeks, ending on the Friday closest to September 30. For clarity of presentation, we present all periods as if the year ended on September30. We refer to the fiscal year ended September 30, 2024 as fiscal 2024 and the fiscal year ended September30, 2025 as fiscal 2025. Overvi...
